$description: BIM INTERIOR token category — furniture BIM Objects and circulation constraints for Key Plan authoring. Each furniture token carries confirmed Steelcase/manufacturer product data (dimensions mm, clearance mm, SKU, weight, IFC class, source URL). Circulation tokens carry the applicable code reference and spatial thresholds. Used as input to tool-keyplan for constraint validation and DTCG compilation. Sources: steelcase.com product pages (retrieved 2026-05-22), coalesse.com, AEC Floor Plates Key Plans Notes.pdf, ASR A1.2 (2011), DIN 18040, ArbStättV §12.

$value.weight_note: 33 kg confirmed as gross/packaged weight from UK steelcase.com; net weight not published

steelcase-leap-v2.$description: Steelcase Leap V2 ergonomic task chair (462 Series). W 686 mm × D 629 mm (seat-travel envelope) × H 978–1099 mm. Seat height 410–540 mm. No public SKU — configured to order. Source: uk.steelcase.com + au.steelcase.com (retrieved 2026-05-22).

$value.sku_note: Base ordering code for rectangle C-leg extended-height variant; individual configurations carry unique model strings
$value.weight_note: Confirmed for 58" × 29" configuration only; other sizes not published

steelcase-migration-se-58x29.$description: Steelcase Migration SE height-adjustable desk, 58" × 29" (1473 × 737 mm). Extended-height base: 574–1237 mm. Motor: 24V DC, 33 mm/sec. Weight capacity 99.8 kg surface load. Source: steelcase.com product page + user manual part 1323350001 (retrieved 2026-05-22).

$value.sku_note: AL3636USC appeared in a spec snippet but could not be confirmed from a live Steelcase page
$value.weight_note: Not confirmed from steelcase.com; 49.6–92.6 lbs range cited for Groupwork rectangular variants
$value.seating_note: Steelcase rates the 36" round as 4 persons; used here as a 3-person round per FFE program

steelcase-groupwork-36.$description: Steelcase Groupwork 36-Inch Working Height Round Table. Diameter 914 mm, H 724 mm. Steelcase rates as 4-person; used as 3-person round in Private Office Key Plans per FFE program. Source: steelcase.com/products/conference-collaborative-tables/groupwork/ (retrieved 2026-05-22).

$value.model: Currency Enhanced Bookcase — 36" W × 15" D × 72 11/16" H

steelcase-currency-bookcase-36.$description: Steelcase Currency Enhanced Bookcase, 36" wide (914 × 381 × 1846 mm). 4 adjustable shelves. Source: Currency NASPO spec guide June 2025 via steelcase.com (retrieved 2026-05-22).

coalesse-wing-ch445.$description: Wing Chair CH445 by Carl Hansen & Son (Coalesse Partners product). W 899 mm × D 896 mm × H 1031 mm. Seat height 391 mm. Weight 36 kg. Designed Hans J. Wegner 1960. Source: coalesse.com/products/seating/lounge-seating/ch445-wing-chair/ (retrieved 2026-05-22).

generic-coat-rack.$description: Generic freestanding coat rack / hook panel. Non-Steelcase; dimensions are representative (400 × 300 mm footprint, 1800 mm height). Used in Zone 3 corridor entry of Private Office Key Plans.

$value.standard: ASR A1.2 (Technische Regeln für Arbeitsstätten — Raumabmessungen und Bewegungsflächen)
$value.wheelchair_note: DIN 18040 — 1500 mm turning circle diameter (750 mm radius) required at door approach
$value.european_lighting_note: All desk positions must be within 6.0 m of an exterior glazed facade
code_references: ASR A1.2 §4.1 (2011) — 8 m² minimum room area per person
ArbStättV §12 — 875 mm single-person aisle, 1200 mm two-way
DIN 18040-1 — 1500 mm wheelchair turning circle at door
European Lighting Standard EN 12464-1 — desk within 6 m of facade glazing

standard-private-office.$description: Circulation constraints for Private Office Key Plans. ASR A1.2: minimum 8 m² per person. ArbStättV §12: 875 mm single-person aisle. DIN 18040: 1500 mm wheelchair turning circle. European Lighting Standard EN 12464-1: desk within 6 m of exterior glazing.
